name: YieldRouter
description: Revenue flywheel yield aggregator for Initia. One deposit routes across 4 revenue streams: vault yield, Enshrined LP staking, LP trading fees, and appchain revenue share. On-chain routing engine scores strategies by risk-adjusted APY and allocates capital optimally.
features: On-chain strategy routing engine with composite scoring algorithm
4 simultaneous revenue streams from a single deposit
Enshrined LP staking for dual yield (LP fees + staking rewards)
Auto-rebalancing when APY drift exceeds threshold
Non-custodial smart contract architecture with 60+ unit tests
initiaNativeFeatures: InterwovenKit integration for wallet connection and transaction handling
Auto-Sign Session UX for seamless repeated transactions
Interwoven Bridge for cross-chain deposits via openBridge/openDeposit
Initia Usernames (.init) support for human-readable addresses
Enshrined Liquidity staking (LP + validator staking in one position)

contracts.VaultStrategy: Core vault with ERC20 share tracking, deposit/withdraw, strategy routing, and revenue compounding
contracts.RevenueDistributor: Keeper-driven harvest cycle across 4 revenue adapters with performance fee
contracts.EnshrinedStaker: Initia-native Enshrined LP staking with validator management and epoch rewards
contracts.StrategyRouter: On-chain routing brain — composite scoring, top-N selection, proportional allocation
